purpose: Inventory of legacy NurseNest / Replit blog generation, scheduling, and import surfaces in this repository (read-only map for safe recovery).

replitExports.notes: Blog rows were historically aligned with `content_items` and allied SEO dumps; canonical DB import for public blog uses JSON/HTML fields (`content_html`, `content_md`, `meta_title`, `meta_description`, `slug`, `published_at`). Copy exports into `data/replit-exports/` before import (see docs/replit-question-recovery-inventory.md for import dir conventions).

staticClientSeo.structure: TypeScript array `SEO_CONTENT_ARTICLES`: title, slug, sections[{heading, content, items?, tip?}], faqs, relatedLinks, seo fields — flattened to markdown-like body in `scripts/import-blog.ts`.

digitalOceanSpaces.schemaReference: Prisma model `BinaryAsset` / admin copy references Spaces for blog images; blog `body` is DB text, not bucket HTML. Image workflows: `src/lib/blog/blog-image-workflow.ts`.
digitalOceanSpaces.rule: Do not reintroduce raw `gs://` URLs per project guardrails; use current CDN/Spaces helpers.

legacyGeneratorBehavior.description: Original Replit-era flow: topic → AI/HTML article; allied static content used structured sections.
currentEquivalentModules: nursenest-core/src/lib/blog/blog-batch-schedule.ts — topic paste → `BlogBatchScheduleItem` rows with planned publish times

legacySchedulerBehavior.description: Staggered publish slots via `BlogBatchSchedule`, queue refill (`ensureDailyBlogQueue`), and time-based promotion of `BlogPost` rows whose `publishAt`/`scheduledAt` is due.
currentEquivalentModules: nursenest-core/src/app/api/cron/blog-batch-schedule/route.ts — POST cron: ensureDailyBlogQueue + processDue + promoteScheduled + revalidate paths
legacySchedulerBehavior.restoredCli: nursenest-core/scripts/blog/legacy-scheduler.ts (invokes the same functions as the cron route for production-safe batch runs)

contentShape.database: BlogPost.body is HTML text; SEO: seoTitle, seoDescription, slug, tags, category, relatedLessonPaths, relatedTools, internalLinkPlan JSON
contentShape.importNormalization: Replit JSON → HTML or markdown body; `source-key:` tag for stable dedupe
